Dear Candidate

Thank you for submitting your assignment.

We wanted to share a quick update on the selection process. Our team is still in the process of carefully reviewing the submissions. Given both the quality and the volume of responses, the evaluation is taking a little longer than we had anticipated.

We expect to share the outcome with you by mid-July. Candidates shortlisted at that stage will be invited for one final interaction, where they will be asked to walk us through their submission and thought process.

Don’t Wait Until Laws Change. Get Certified Now!
Join 1+ Million US Citizens


Hi there,

If you’ve been thinking about getting your concealed carry certification, now is the time to act.

Across the country, lawmakers are shifting laws, some strengthening 2A protections, others tightening requirements. 

Either direction leads to one reality:

If you’re not concealed carry certified yet, you’re behind.

Countrywide Concealed has trained over 1,000,000 law-abiding citizens using a state-approved curriculum that meets your state's requirements and prepares you for responsible carry from day one.
Every course includes:

• State-approved training that satisfies your state’s education standards
• Clear breakdowns of state handgun laws so you actually understand what applies to you
• Reciprocity guidance that tells you exactly where your permit is valid
• Situational awareness, conflict avoidance, and real-world carry instruction

Whether the next legislative change favors concealed carriers or restricts them, one thing is guaranteed, being certified now puts you in control.

Waiting could mean:
 • Longer processing timelines
• Increased demand
• Stricter requirements
• Delays in getting your permit approved

Don’t leave your future up to lawmakers or chance. Join the millions who’ve already taken the step toward legal, responsible concealed carry.

Get your certification training started today.
